business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Commercial Property Coverage Form CP 00 10 10 12; $50,000 deductible applies; 80% coinsurance
Commercial Property Coverage Form CP 00 10 10 12; $50,000 deductible applies; 80% coinsurance
Endorsement CP 15 08 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers actual loss of Business Income during period of restoration including net income and continuing normal operating expenses
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88); effective 03/15/2026; Coinsurance Additional Condition suspended for property specified in Schedule during Declarations period; property value agreed to be not less than amount shown in Schedule

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services; handwritten annotation 'Need docs' present on endorsement page

positives: Agreed Value endorsement suspends coinsurance condition, reducing underinsurance exposure
Equipment Breakdown Coverage endorsement included for mechanical, electrical, and pressure equipment
Utility Services Direct Damage endorsement broadens coverage for utility interruption
Business Income and Extra Expense coverage in place with high limit of $57,954,000
Coverage Extensions applicable as Coinsurance is 80% or more, including Newly Acquired/Constructed Property, Non-Owned Detached Trailers, and Property Off-Premises
concerns: Handwritten annotation 'Need docs' on Utility Services — Direct Damage endorsement page indicating pending documentation
Specific endorsement schedules reference effective date of 03/15/2026 — mid-policy additions warrant review
Business operations span Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors but only one mailing address documented
